## Discussion

The line segments collectively plot an output value for the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMappedMetaParameterDefinition/inputMetaParameterDefinition] property.

# envelope

**Instance Property**

A collection of line segments that curve and connect to form a graph.

## Declaration

```swift
var envelope: PHASEEnvelope { get }
```

## Discussion

The line segments collectively plot an output value for the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMappedMetaParameterDefinition/inputMetaParameterDefinition] property.

To plot the input, call [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEnvelope/evaluate(x:)], passing in the input metaparameter’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMetaParameter/value].

To gradually change the input over time, call [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameter/fade(value:duration:)].
title: envelope
